name: 10 Shelf Hanging Shoe Storage Organizer Tan - Brightroom™
description:
This 10-Shelf Hanging Shoe Storage Organizer from Brightroom™ will help you keep all your favorite shoes neatly organized in your closet. Made from fabric in a neutral tan hue, this hanging organizer features ten shelves designed to hold shoes of all kinds. Great for use in any closet space, the organizer is also equipped with hooks for easy hanging.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
